title: microseris nutans
intro: Microseris nutans, also known as the Western needle grass or Western needlegrass, is a perennial wildflower native to the western United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Microseris nutans include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Microseris nutans can be prepared as a tea or infused oil for its medicinal properties, and it is also used in traditional herbal remedies for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
